title: Alph (Rogue)
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]|the [[Alph (guard)|guard]] in the [[City of Bone]]}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Alph_rebel.png]] |name=Alph |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' [[secret armada]][[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' (1977) 61]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Dark |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] **[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' {{C|Shira Brie}} |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Whew. According to the transceiver signal, that's ''Alph's'' ship! Good thing I didn't—huh? S-someone ''else'' nailed him! They got ''Alph!''|Luke Skywalker's thoughts during the battle of the secret armada|}} '''Alph''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rebel pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. When the Alliance learned that a massive [[Secret armada|Imperial armada]] was transporting a communications-amplifying [[Teezl]] creature to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Alph was one of four Rogues [[Operation Earplug|selected]] to [[Pilot/Legends|fly]] captured Imperial [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] into the heart of the [[Fleet/Legends|armada]] and take the creature out. After obtaining the recognition codes needed to enter the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|fleet]], the four set off in their TIEs as [[Flying Bantha Squadron]] and successfully joined the armada. Their [[Battle of the secret armada|attack]] on the armada's [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] prompted a [[Space warfare/Legends|counterattack]] that [[Death/Legends|killed]] Alph, but his [[Delta Leader/Legends|mission commander]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], was able to destroy the Teezl. ==Biography== {{Quote|… if reports about the armada's ''cargo'' are accurate, there's a lot riding on this raid.|Luke Skywalker, before the infiltration of the secret armada|}} Alph was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], during the Alliance's [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|war]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He served the Rebels as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. Alph was stationed at the Alliance's [[Haven Base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] in the first half of 3 ABY, around the [[Time/Legends|time]] the Rebels learned that the Empire was building a [[secret armada]].[[Star Wars (1977) 60|''Star Wars'' (1977) 60]] The [[Imperial Navy/Legends|armada]]—one of the largest in Imperial history—was transporting a [[Teezl]], a unique creature that could naturally amplify [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] communications, to the Empire's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] world of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030626arbra4|series=Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm|text=Part 4: Rebels in Disguise}} A strike at the armada was planned, and the Alliance initiated [[Operation Earplug]] by acquiring four Imperial [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] from the [[Arms dealer/Legends|weapons trader]] [[Orion Ferret]]. The TIEs were then used to [[Skirmish on Spindrift|seize]] an [[Spindrift Station|Imperial base]] on the planet [[Spindrift]] and obtain the [[Fleet/Legends|armada's]] route coordinates. The Alliance was finally ready to infiltrate the enemy fleet, and Alph was chosen to be one of the mission's pilots. Alph and a group of other Rebels made their way to an [[uninhabited planetoid]] near the armada's route and sent out a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signal]], which was picked up by a far reconnaissance patrol of four Imperial TIE fighters. After Rebel [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing fighters]] destroyed them, their [[Milnn|sole survivor]] was forced to reveal the recognition codes for entrance into the armada. [[File:Alphs_TIE_destroyed_MC61.jpg|250px|thumb|Alph's fighter is destroyed]] Alph and three other Rogues—[[Lumiya|Shira Brie]], [[Hanc Thorben]], and [[Delta Leader/Legends|mission commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]—then boarded their TIE fighters and became [[Flying Bantha Squadron]]. The TIEs had been modified to fire only six [[Laser/Legends|laser]] bursts at standard strength, after which they would release their energy stores in a [[Ultra-power blast|shot]] powerful enough to cut through even the strongest [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]]. [[Signal transceiver]]s had also been added to the craft so that the [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] could recognize each other among the enemy fleet. After arriving at the armada and gaining entrance with their stolen codes, the four Flying [[Bantha/Legends|Banthas]] each chose an Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] and [[Battle of the secret armada|attacked]]. The Imperials mounted a hasty [[Space warfare/Legends|counterattack]] and began to fire wildly, initially only hitting each other but eventually destroying Alph's TIE with lasers. Alph was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the explosion, but Skywalker was able to take out the Teezl and win the [[Standard day/Legends|day]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|OK, gang, this is it! Everyone ready? Alph?''"
"''All set, Commander!|Skywalker and Alph, before attacking the armada|}} Alph was a member of Rogue Squadron, a group that was composed of the Rebel Alliance's top pilots.{{CSWECite|III|106|Rogue Squadron}} However, he was killed during the battle of the secret armada while flying a TIE Fighter. Alph had dark skin. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|On a mission to destroy an enemy communications device, Brie, Skywalker, and a handful of other Rogues flew captured TIEs into the heart of an Imperial armada.|Shira Brie's entry in ''The New Essential Guide to Characters''|''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''}} Alph was created in [[1982]] as a character in [[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' (1977) 61]], an issue of [[Marvel Comics]]' ongoing [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]]. The issue was written by [[David Michelinie]] and [[Walter Simonson|Walt Simonson]], penciled by Simonson, and colored by [[Glynis Oliver|Glynis Wein]]. [[2002|Twenty years later]], Shira Brie's entry in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' explicitly confirmed that Alph was a member of Rogue Squadron. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' (1977) 61]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 61}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' {{C|under "Shira Brie"}} {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Alfie |hu=Alph }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Rogue Squadron personnel]]
